summary: Two CSS-only changes: (1) Remove self-start from swiper-slide to enable equal-height cards via Swiper's default stretch behavior, (2) Add image zoom-on-hover effect to card images inside the dynamic-content-carousel using the existing Archive block pattern (overflow:hidden + scale transform on img).

fileChanges.description: Remove 'self-start' from swiper-slide class to allow equal-height cards
fileChanges.details: Line 150: Change class from 'swiper-slide self-start h-auto!' to 'swiper-slide h-auto!' — removing 'self-start' allows the Swiper flexbox layout to stretch all slides to the tallest slide's height. The 'h-auto!' ensures the slide wrapper takes the natural height. The card templates already use 'h-full' on their inner elements (article and anchor), so they will fill the stretched slide height automatically.

fileChanges.description: Add image hover zoom effect scoped to dynamic-content-carousel cards
fileChanges.details:
Add CSS rules following the existing Archive block pattern (Archive.css lines 133-142). Scope to '.dynamic-content-carousel' to avoid affecting other carousels. Rules needed:

1. `.dynamic-content-carousel .card-post img, .dynamic-content-carousel .card-team-member img { transition: transform 0.3s ease; }` — smooth transition for scale
2. `.dynamic-content-carousel .card-post:hover img, .dynamic-content-carousel .card-team-member:hover img { transform: scale(1.05); }` — 5% zoom on hover

Note: The card-post and card-team-member templates already have `overflow-hidden` on their image containers (the `div.overflow-hidden.rounded-xl` wrappers), so the scaled image will be clipped to its original bounds. The card-resource and card-policy cards do not have images, so no rules needed for them.

designDecisions.recommendation: Remove self-start from swiper-slide to let Swiper's default align-items:stretch behavior make all cards equal height. Cards already use h-full and flex-col with mt-auto on CTA, so content alignment is preserved.
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested equal-height cards. TestimonialsCarousel already uses this pattern (h-auto! without self-start on line 101).

designDecisions.decision: Image zoom-in hover effect at scale(1.05) with 0.3s ease transition
designDecisions.recommendation: Follow the existing Archive block pattern (Archive.css lines 133-142) which uses the same scale(1.05) with 0.3s ease. Apply only to card-post and card-team-member cards since those are the only card types with images. The overflow:hidden container already exists on both card templates.
designDecisions.evidence: Archive block already implements identical hover zoom on card-team-member and card-post images (Archive.css lines 133-142). User confirmed images should have zoom-in effect with overflow hidden.

notes.noAttributeChanges: Both changes are pure CSS/class modifications. No new attributes needed in block.json.
notes.noTsxSync: The TSX file uses FilteredServerSideRender for the carousel section, so PHP output is what renders. The swiper-slide class is only in the PHP template. No TSX changes needed.
notes.existingOverflowHidden: card-post has 'div.overflow-hidden.rounded-xl' wrapping its image (line 23). card-team-member has 'div.overflow-hidden.rounded-xl' wrapping its image (line 22-23). Both already clip overflow, so scale transform on the img will produce the desired zoom-without-resize effect.
notes.cardHeightChain: The height chain for equal-height cards is: swiper-slide (h-auto! + stretch) -> card wrapper div (h-full on anchor) -> article (h-full + flex-col) -> mt-auto on CTA pushes it to bottom. All four card types already have this chain in place.
